# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent edge computing security.
# Category: edge_computing_security

import { NextResponse } from 'next/server';

export const config = {
  runtime: 'edge',
};

export default async function handler(req: Request) {
  if (req.method !== 'POST') {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Method not allowed' }, { status: 405 });
  }

  const { content, headers } = await req.json();

  if (!content || typeof content !== 'string') {
    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Invalid content' }, { status: 400 });
  }

  const responseHeaders = new Headers();

  if (headers && typeof headers === 'object') {
    Object.entries(headers).forEach(([key, value]) => {
      if (typeof value === 'string') {
        responseHeaders.set(key, value);
      }
    });
  }

  const stream = new ReadableStream({
    start(controller) {
      controller.enqueue(new TextEncoder().encode(content));
      controller.close();
    },
  });

  return new Response(stream, {
    headers: responseHeaders,
    status: 200,
  });
}
